source_sql: SELECT ZEROIFNULL(amount) AS amount FROM staging.orders
target_sql: SELECT COALESCE(amount, 0) AS amount FROM staging.orders

source_sql: SELECT NVL(discount, 0) AS discount FROM staging.orders
target_sql: SELECT COALESCE(discount, 0) AS discount FROM staging.orders

source_sql: SELECT * FROM t WHERE order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 30
target_sql: SELECT * FROM t WHERE order_date >= DATEADD(day, -30, CURRENT_DATE)

source_sql: CREATE LOCAL TEMP TABLE tmp_x ON COMMIT PRESERVE ROWS AS SELECT 1 AS id
target_sql: CREATE OR REPLACE TEMPORARY TABLE tmp_x AS SELECT 1 AS id

source_sql: SELECT STRING_AGG(name, ',') FROM users
target_sql: SELECT LISTAGG(name, ',') FROM users

source_sql: SELECT APPROXIMATE_COUNT_DISTINCT(user_id) FROM events
target_sql: SELECT APPROX_COUNT_DISTINCT(user_id) FROM events

source_sql: SELECT DATEDIFF('day', start_dt, end_dt) FROM t
target_sql: SELECT DATEDIFF(day, start_dt, end_dt) FROM t

source_sql: SELECT SYSDATE FROM dual
target_sql: SELECT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()

source_sql: SELECT GETDATE(), NVL(x, 0) FROM t
target_sql: SELECT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), COALESCE(x, 0) FROM t

source_sql: SELECT IFNULL(a, 0), STRING_AGG(b, ',') FROM t GROUP BY a
target_sql: SELECT COALESCE(a, 0), LISTAGG(b, ',') FROM t GROUP BY a

source_sql: SELECT customer_id, ZEROIFNULL(SUM(order_amount)) AS monetary, COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS frequency, DATEDIFF('day', MAX(order_date), CURRENT_DATE) AS recency FROM staging.orders GROUP BY customer_id
target_sql: SELECT customer_id, COALESCE(SUM(order_amount), 0) AS monetary, COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS frequency, DATEDIFF(day, MAX(order_date), CURRENT_DATE) AS recency FROM staging.orders GROUP BY customer_id

source_sql: SELECT user_id, CASE WHEN ZEROIFNULL(churn_score) > 0.7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS churn_label FROM ml.user_scores
target_sql: SELECT user_id, CASE WHEN COALESCE(churn_score, 0) > 0.7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS churn_label FROM ml.user_scores

source_sql: SELECT * FROM events WHERE event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 7
target_sql: SELECT * FROM events WHERE event_date >= DATEADD(day, -7, CURRENT_DATE)

source_sql: SELECT * FROM events WHERE event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 14
target_sql: SELECT * FROM events WHERE event_date >= DATEADD(day, -14, CURRENT_DATE)

source_sql: SELECT * FROM events WHERE event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 30
target_sql: SELECT * FROM events WHERE event_date >= DATEADD(day, -30, CURRENT_DATE)

source_sql: SELECT * FROM events WHERE event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 60
target_sql: SELECT * FROM events WHERE event_date >= DATEADD(day, -60, CURRENT_DATE)

source_sql: SELECT * FROM events WHERE event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 90
target_sql: SELECT * FROM events WHERE event_date >= DATEADD(day, -90, CURRENT_DATE)

source_sql: SELECT * FROM events WHERE event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 180
target_sql: SELECT * FROM events WHERE event_date >= DATEADD(day, -180, CURRENT_DATE)

source_sql: SELECT * FROM events WHERE event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 365
target_sql: SELECT * FROM events WHERE event_date >= DATEADD(day, -365, CURRENT_DATE)
